# Quantum-inertial dead-reckoning reference (GNSS-denied holdover budget).
# Oracle 1 (VRW): independent numpy Monte-Carlo double-integration of white
#   acceleration noise (M=200000 paths, 1200 steps/path, seed=0xc0ffee).
# Oracle 2 (bias/scale-factor): Groves 2013 INS error-propagation closed form
#   (Principles of GNSS, Inertial & Multisensor Integrated Navigation, 2nd ed.,
#   Artech House, ISBN 978-1-60807-005-3) + independent numpy double-integration.
# Consumed by tests/quantum_inertial_dead_reckoning_reference.rs.
# Units: m, s, m/s^2, (m/s^2)^2/Hz.
#
# CAI name | wavelength_m | pulse_sep_t | atom_number | contrast | cycle_time_s | q_va
CAI Tshort | 7.80241209e-07 | 0.005 | 1000000.0 | 0.5 | 0.5 | 1.2336387954001238e-11
CAI Tmed | 7.80241209e-07 | 0.01 | 1000000.0 | 0.5 | 0.5 | 7.710242471250773e-13
CAI Tlong | 7.80241209e-07 | 0.05 | 1000000.0 | 0.5 | 0.5 | 1.2336387954001237e-15
CAI Tvlong | 7.80241209e-07 | 0.1 | 1000000.0 | 0.5 | 0.5 | 7.710242471250773e-17
# (q_va spans 5.20 decades across the CAI configs)
